description: "Uninstall a specific plugin by ID to remove the functionality provided by the plugin."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Uninstall a specific plugin by ID"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/v1/partners/plugins/{pluginId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Uninstall a specific plugin by ID to remove the functionality provided by the plugin.
